! Gallery Plugin

A compact gallery plugin for image/content browsing.

!! Features

* `<<gallery>>` macro with masonry layout
** `filter` parameter: use any TW filter
** `tag` parameter: list tiddlers tagged with the given tag
** no params: uses `currentTiddler` as tag
* Click image to toggle modes:
** gallery mode (all items)
** single-image mode (focused item only)
* Hover toolbar per item:
** Open in story river
** Inline tag edit
* Story template integration via `$:/tags/StoryTiddlerTemplateFilter`
** Add tag `$:/tags/gallery` to a tiddler to use gallery-first view
** Default parts are collapsed and use core fold/unfold banner style

!! Usage

```wikitext
<<gallery>>
<<gallery tag:"MyPhotos">>
<<gallery filter:"[tag[Photos]sort[title]]">>
```
